documents.label: A copy of the minor's birth certificate
A copy of your birth certificate
A court order
Foster care certification
A copy of your driver's license or other government-issued identification
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
A copy of the minor's Social Security card
A copy of your Social Security card

authority.notes: Listed under 'To show you are the minor's parent or authorized representative' — any one of these is sufficient.

parentId.notes: Listed under 'For proof of your identity' with 'provide one from each category' — the bullets within this category are OR options.

address.notes: The form collects the guardian's current address as a form field but does not require a separate proof-of-address document.

childId.notes: The form explicitly states 'please provide both of the following' for the minor's documents, requiring both the Social Security card and birth certificate.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Proof of guardianship (if not named on child's birth certificate)
Driver's license or another government issued identification card (e.g. state ID card)
Child's Social Security card
Proof of address (bank statement, utility bill, or insurance statement)

authority.notes: The child's birth certificate establishes parentage/authority if the parent is named on it. A separate proof of guardianship is required only if the parent is NOT named on the child's birth certificate — so these two together cover all authority cases as alternatives.

childId.notes: The page explicitly lists both 'a copy of your child's birth certificate' AND 'a copy of your child's Social Security card' as required items in the 'all of the following' list, with no indication that one substitutes for the other.

mailingAddress.notes: The page lists two addresses: standard mail (PO Box 9554) and overnight mail (701 Experian Parkway). The standard mail address is the primary mailing address. Neither is explicitly labeled 'protected consumer freeze' — this page covers checking if a minor has a credit report, fraud alerts, and security freezes generally.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Court order or legal guardianship document
Foster care placement document
Parent's government-issued ID (e.g. driver's license, passport, state ID)
Power of attorney
Child's Social Security card or number
Parent's Social Security card or number
Utility bill or proof of address (utility, bank, insurance statement)

authority.notes: The page requires one piece of documentation proving sufficient proof of authority. Guardianship/conservator documents are grouped under 'court' for the widget display.

parentId.notes: Page content unavailable due to Cloudflare block. Values are estimated from known TransUnion requirements.

address.notes: Page content unavailable due to Cloudflare block. Values are estimated from known TransUnion requirements.

childId.notes: Page content unavailable due to Cloudflare block. Values are estimated from known TransUnion requirements.

mailingAddress.notes: Both the FAQ page and the address-source page were blocked by Cloudflare and returned no readable content. This address is the known TransUnion Protected Consumer Freeze mailing address from prior knowledge. CRITICAL: Manual verification against the live page is strongly recommended before using this address.
